articles.title: The Nike Air Max Phenomena "Cacao Wow/Metallic Silver" Applies a Loafer Silhouette to the Air Max SNDR Sole
articles.summary: Name: Nike Air Max Phenomena "Cacao Wow/Metallic Silver"Colorway: Cacao Wow/Metallic SilverSKU: IM8814-200MSRP: TBCRelease Date: TBCThe Nike Air Max Phenomena is Nike's take on the loafer, a silhouette developed by the brand's SWDC design crew that places a dress shoe-informed upper onto the sole unit of the Air Max SNDR. The "Cacao Wow/Metallic Silver" colorway is continuing Nike's sustained push into footwear that borrows from tailored and formal dress codes without fully departing from its sneaker construction logic.The sole connection to the Air Max SNDR is the Phenomena's most legible technical detail. Enveloped in a moody "Black" leather build, the silhouette is reinforced with an oversized tongue cover secured by dual buckled straps on the lateral side. Additional leather overlays at the toe enhance durability, while debossed Nike Air branding appears on the heel tab for a subtle yet elevated finish. The lone accent against the monochrome palette is a pair of mini metallic silver Swooshes, adding a sharp industrial touch.Elevating the sneaker’s stance is a thick, platform midsole featuring the iconic molded "AIR" graphic toward the heel. Bringing together four defining models - the XT-4 OG, XT-6, XT-Whisper and XT-Pathway 2 - the capsule spotlights the natural evolution of footwear from rigorous outdoor performance gear into enduring subcultural lifestyle staples.Visually unifying the capsule is a newly developed color pack that masterfully pairs deep, atmospheric blues with grounding, neutral tones. articles.title: Rick Owens Beats Paris Heatwave With Air-Conditioned adidas Collaboration for SS27
articles.summary: Summary Rick Owens unveiled his SS27 "STONE" menswear collection during at Paris Fashion Week.The lineup debuts fan-inflated adidas ClimaCool outerwear and a 2027 running shoe.Radical pieces include hand-piped latex tops and architectural Tensegrity chaps. Amid a sweltering Paris heatwave, Rick Owens unveiled his Spring/Summer 2027 Menswear show with striking punctuality — an unusual defiance of typical Paris Fashion Week delays. Transforming the outdoor concrete grounds of the Palais de Tokyo into a dystopian theater , Owens’ collection, titled "STONE" , confronted a collective sense of societal menace through themes of discipline, transformation, and physical resilience.Models advanced along a steel‑grate runway like defensive figures - choosing to arm, train, or turn to stone - their se

The device targets enthusiasts seeking a high-performance 4:3 display format. This specific screen ratio naturally fits the native output of fifth and sixth-generation console libraries. articles.title: This Nike Air Force 1 Low “What The” Stacks Safari, Elephant Print, and Jewel Eye Branding Into One Black Build
articles.summary: Name: Nike Air Force 1 Low “What The”Colorway: TBCSKU: IV4451-010MSRP: TBCRelease Date: TBCNike's Air Force 1 Low “What The” is arriving with a texture-forward build that distributes three distinct materials across a predominantly black upper. The release layers tumbled leather, elephant print, and safari texture across specific zones of the silhouette, with a Tough Red accent and an unusual backtab treatment rounding out a construction that rewards close inspection.The upper is divided with clear intent. The toe box and quarter anchor the shoe in tumbled black leather, providing a matte base that keeps the overall palette grounded. articles.summary: Name: Nike Dunk Low Premium “Sesame”Colorway: Sesame/Pale Ivory/SesameSKU: IM4411-200MSRP: TBCRelease Date: Fall 2026Nike is pushing the iconic Dunk Low Premium silhouette into chunkier, more sculptural territory. articles.title: Adidas, Uniqlo, Calvin Klein ads banned for greenwashing
articles.summary: LONDON – The UK advertising watchdog has banned paid Google ads from Adidas, Uniqlo and Calvin Klein for greenwashing. articles.title: The Nike Air Rift 2 "Summit White/Swan" Brings the Split-Toe Slip-On Back for Summer 2026
articles.summary: Name: Nike Air Rift 2 “Summit White/Swan”Colorway:SKU: IQ8006-100MSRP: $125 USDRelease Date: June 25Where to Buy: NikeNike is bringing back the Air Rift 2 in a women's-exclusive "Summit White/Swan" colorway for Summer 2026, the latest release in the brand's sustained revival of the Air Rift line. The style marks another chapter in Nike's renewed focus on the split-toe silhouette, which has built significant momentum in recent seasons off the back of the original Air Rift's return.The Air Rift 2 first released in 2002 as a structural evolution of the original 1996 Air Rift, a shoe developed with input from barefoot runners training in Kenya's Rift Valley. Where the original Air Rift featured a Mary Jane-style single strap closure and a more pronounced midsole, the Air Rift 2 stripped things

articles.title: Ronnie Fieg and New Balance Debut the 2011, Kith's First Original Silhouette, to Mark 15 Years Together
articles.summary: Name: Kith New Balance 2011Colorway: Bark, Redwood, Leaf, SakuraSKU: TBCMSRP: TBCRelease Date: June 26 (In-store), June 29 (Global)Where to Buy: Kith, Kith AppRonnie Fieg and New Balance have debuted the 2011, the first original New Balance silhouette to come from their fifteen-year collaboration, releasing as the centerpiece of the Kith x New Balance 15th Anniversary collection. The silhouette's name directly references 2011, the year Kith was established, and its launch is timed to the opening of New Balance at Kith, a new collaborative retail space on the lower level of the Kith West Hollywood flagship.The 2011 has been two years in development. articles.title: Rier's Spring 2027 Collection Builds an Alpine Wardrobe From Natural Wool, Linen, Silk, and a Fourth Salomon Collaboration
articles.summary: Rier's Spring 2027 collection presents its most expansive material program to date, spanning 100% natural wool fleece, Austrian and Italian-sourced linen, 100% cotton fine-rib jersey, and multiple silk constructions, anchored by a fourth collaborative footwear chapter with Salomon and a returning jewellery partnership with Zoé Mohm. The collection is showing at the brand's Paris showroom from June 24 to June 30.Rier's signature 100% natural wool fleece returns in a reworked high-neck pullover with a less cropped, boxier volume, a vertical zipped chest pocket, an adjustable hem, and a single-shoulder construction designed for spring layering. articles.summary: Name: Padmore & Barnes x Realtree Original x Albino & Preto Sport BootColorway: CamoSKU: TBCMSRP: TBCRelease Date: June 24Where to Buy: Albino & PretoAlbino & Preto has unveiled a four-brand collaboration with Padmore & Barnes, Realtree Original, and RCarryall, reinterpreting the Padmore & Barnes Sport Boot through an outdoor utility lens and pairing it with a special edition tote bag series from cult Southern California bag maker RCarryall.The Sport Boot's place in the Padmore & Barnes catalog has always rested on a particular tension: a silhouette with genuine craft heritage, worn most often in contexts that have little to do with the terrain it was built to handle. Albino & Preto's reinterpretation leans directly into the boot's utilitarian origins rather than softening them. The Realtr

articles.title: The SP5DER x adidas Originals F50 Formotion Drags the Football Cleat Into Street-Ready Territory
articles.summary: Name: SP5DER x adidas Originals F50 FormotionColorway: Silver Metallic/Core BlackSKU: KZ6575MSRP: $190 USDRelease Date: June 26 (KINGSPIDER), July 1 (Global)Where to Buy: SP5DER, CONFIRMED appYoung Thug’s SP5DER and adidas Originals have introduced the F50 Formotion, a new collaborative silhouette that pulls the construction logic of a football cleat into a street-facing runner, arriving as the centerpiece of the two brands' first head-to-toe football-inspired collection.The F50 Formotion's design premise is a direct collision of two distinct adidas performance histories. The upper draws from the Adizero F50 III, one of adidas' most recognizable football cleat silhouettes, while the tooling beneath it is Formotion, a system originally developed for running. articles.title: Nike's Mind 001 AMP Gets an Unofficial "Spider-Man" Makeover
articles.summary: Name: Nike Mind 001 AMP “Spider-Man”Colorway: Indigo Burst/Metallic Platinum-Hyper Punch-BlackSKU: IZ6659-400MSRP: $95 USDRelease Date: July 19Where to Buy: NikeNike is officially set to release the Mind 001 AMP in an "Indigo Burst" colorway, a blue and red combination that lands on one of the brand's more structurally unusual silhouettes and makes its stranger design decisions considerably harder to ignore.The Mind 001 AMP sits in an increasingly populated category of footwear that borrows the form language of recovery and slides but applies it to something more architecturally deliberate. articles.title: Mizuno Reissues Its Flagship WAVE PROPHECY 1 in Two High-Contrast Colorways

articles.title: Nike's Air Force 1 Low "Patent Denim" Seals Coastal Blue Denim Beneath a Glossy Finish
articles.summary: Name: Nike Air Force 1 Low “Patent Denim”Colorway: Coastal Blue/Natural-Flax-Coastal BlueSKU: IM5757-400MSRP: TBCRelease Date: Summer 2026Nike is set to release the Air Force 1 Low "Patent Denim," applying a glossy patent finish over a Coastal Blue denim upper in a construction that keeps the fabric's weave and tonal variation visible beneath the gloss.The material logic here is the central point of interest. Rather than replacing denim with patent leather or treating them as separate design elements, the "Patent Denim" build layers the gloss directly over the fabric, allowing the denim's natural weave and the darker shading around the heel and side panels to show through. The result reads differently from a standard patent leather AF1 because the surface has tonal variation built into it,

articles.title: Nike's Total 90 "White/Black" Lets the Football Stitch Pattern Speak for Itself
articles.summary: Name: Nike Total 90 “White/Black”Colorway: TBCSKU: IO2388-100MSRP: TBCRelease Date: TBCNike is reportedly set to release the Total 90 "White/Black," bringing the pack's all-over hexagonal quilted leather upper to its most stripped-back colorway. The “White/Black” build retains the asymmetrical lacing and flat rubber sole of the lifestyle Total 90 series, while the clean two-tone finish gives the shoe's soccer ball-mimicking stitch pattern its clearest canvasThe construction concept driving the Soccer Ball pack is arguably easier to read on the model than on any other colorway in the lineup. articles.title: Nike Outfits the Pegasus Premium in Bold “Cow Print” and Pony Hair
articles.summary: Name: Nike Pegasus Premium “Cow Print”Colorway: Light Orewood Brown/Black-University Red-SailSKU: IR0033-100MSRP: $230 USDRelease Date: Fall 2026Nike's Pegasus Premium roster is set to welcome a new “Cow Print” variant this fall. The upper is grounded by a soft, natural "Light Orewood Brown" engineered mesh, which is sharply contrasted by a solid black tongue, laces and inner lining. Leaning fully into the western-inspired trend, Nike elevates the traditional branding by outfitting the lateral profile Swooshes in a "Sail"-colored pony hair material.The lower half of the sneaker is where the design truly makes its impact. The synthetic mudguard panels and the upper portion of the ZoomX foam midsole are entirely wrapped in an eye-catching, black-and-white cow print pattern. Breaking up this

articles.title: This Yellow Plaid Nike Air Force 1 Low Brings Cher’s Iconic Outfit to Your Feet
articles.summary: Name: Nike Air Force 1 Low "Clueless”Colorway: Multi-Color/Yellow Ochre/White/BlackSKU: IR5596-900MSRP: $125 USDRelease Date: July 2026The Nike Air Force 1 Low “Clueless” is a women’s exclusive sneaker that pays homage to Alicia Silverstone’s iconic yellow plaid outfit from the 1995 film Clueless. The upper is dressed in a bold plaid textile featuring yellow, black and white tones, directly referencing Cher Horowitz’s signature look.A black leather Swoosh overlays the patterned base, while black laces, tongue, and lining provide sharp contrast. Metallic AF1 lace dubraes add a subtle touch of shine,while classic Nike Air branding appears on the tongue, insole and heel tab, reinforcing the shoe’s heritage identity. articles.title: Castore acquires 160-year-old bootmaker Grenson
articles.summary: Premium sportswear brand Castore has taken a 75% stake in boot and shoe maker Grenson, which had been based in Northamptonshire since 1866. Through its corporate vehicle J Sporting Club, Castore has acquired a controlling interest in Grenson. The move also sees Grenson owner Tim Little and his wife Julia Little step down from the...
